data.name: BDSM Sex - Episode 6
data.detailed_description:
A visual novel series with animations about a young woman exploring the world of BDSM. In this episode, Katy tests her limits by obediently fulfilling the arousing demands of her Master and Mistress.

GAME DESCRIPTION

In Episode Six, Katy returns to her Master’s BDSM dungeon, revealing that she has become deeply consumed by feelings of surrender and submission.
Driven by a desire to explore further and push her limits, she is ready for more intense experiences.
Before the session begins, the Master and Mistress make Katy take care of their needs, testing her obedience and devotion.
Ever eager to please, Katy does as they command, skillfully using her mouth, hands, and body to pleasure and satisfy them.
We promise a story with arousing dialogue, realistic-looking characters, and high-definition graphics.

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
